title: palaquium grande var. parvifolium
intro: Palaquium grande var. parvifolium, also known as the small-leaved palaquium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Palaquium grande var. parvifolium include its use in treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
